title: [CI:BUILD] Fix cirrus cirrus-cron GHA workflow scripts, add checks, and tests
body:
Testing github-actions workflows that only operate on 'main' is a major PITA when secret env. vars. are involved.  This is a major demotivation for also not testing related shell scripts.  Fix this by adding tests for the scripts and automate their execution.

Fixes: #16426
